description: Long-document version (~25000 tok) of case_s4_incident_lifecycle: the same supersession (reversed decision + ruled-out item) buried in unrelated filler so budget-matched retrieval cannot pack everything. Live-state GT identical to the short case.

chat.content: Unrelated sidebar 0: can you remind me how the logging pipeline is set up for our team this quarter? Just context, nothing to decide.

Sure, for the logging pipeline: it runs on the standard shared config, owned by the platform guild, reviewed each sprint. Nothing about the logging pipeline changed this cycle and it does not affect the main decision we are tracking. It is purely background so the team stays aligned on routine operations for sprint 0.
